<!--
Thanks for sending a PR! A few quick checks before you press
"Create pull request":

- Reference the issue this PR closes (e.g. "Closes #42").
- Keep the PR focused on one thing — smaller PRs review faster.
- Don't force-push once the PR is open; new commits on top are
  preferred (see CONTRIBUTING.md).
-->

## What this PR does
<!-- One or two sentences. Reference the issue number. -->

## Why
<!-- The "why" reads better than the "what" — "what" is in the diff. -->

## Test plan
<!-- How you verified the change. Manual steps + automated tests. -->

## Checklist
- [ ] `npx shadow-cljs compile test` ends with `0 failures, 0 errors`
- [ ] `npx shadow-cljs release app` exits with **zero warnings**
- [ ] Bug fixes ship with a regression test in the same commit
- [ ] Docs updated when behaviour changed (README / CLAUDE.md /
      docs/plugins.md / CHANGELOG.md as relevant)
